editProfile.title: My profile
editProfile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and security
editProfile.section_address_desc: Your location helps connect you with nearby jobs or workers
editProfile.section_portable_desc: This information is visible to employers looking for workers
editProfile.section_about_desc: This information is visible to workers who view your profile
editProfile.section_privacy_desc: Control what information is visible on your profile
editProfile.section_references_desc: Manage the visibility of your references
editProfile.section_security_desc: Change your password to keep your account protected
editProfile.field_references_no_references: You have no references to display
editProfile.placeholder_biography: Tell us a bit about yourself, your experience and what you offer...
editProfile.placeholder_description: Tell us about your home, family dynamics and what you're looking for in a worker...
editProfile.error_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
editProfile.subscription_no_plan_desc: Choose a plan to access more benefits
editProfile.plan_select: Select the plan that best fits your needs
editProfile.plan_desc_free_employer: Basic profile, 1 active work relationship, attendance tracking, and job offer posting.
editProfile.plan_desc_pro_employer: Includes everything from the Free plan, downloadable PDF reports, payment and due date alerts, verification check, and full financial dashboard.
editProfile.plan_desc_business_employer: Includes everything from the Pro plan, unlimited workers, and unified multi-worker panel.
editProfile.plan_desc_free_employee: Basic profile, work history, contract and attendance management, standard search visibility, and visible references.
editProfile.plan_desc_pro_worker: Includes everything from the Free plan, verification check, priority in search results, and verified work history.
editProfile.face_verify_desc: Verify your identity with a selfie to get a green badge on your profile
editProfile.face_verify_verified_desc: Your face matches your profile picture
editProfile.face_verify_pending_desc: Smile and we'll compare you with your profile picture
editProfile.face_verify_instruction: Look directly at the camera, smile and press Verify
editProfile.face_verify_no_face_profile: No face detected in your profile picture
